# Version 3.119.4
> **Platforms, GTK4, and .NET 10** · Released May 22, 2026 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.119.4) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v3.119.4)

> **Supersedes [3.119.3](3.119.3.md)** · Rolls up preview-only work that was never released as stable — those changes are included cumulatively below.

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.119.4/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/8.3.1.5/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 3.119.4 adds GTK4 views, Linux Bionic, Tizen x64/arm64 support, and .NET 10 SDK compatibility. New platform support spans Linux Bionic (Android-like) native assets, GTK4 via GirCore, Tizen on x64 and arm64, and a .NET 10 SDK upgrade. On Windows, MAUI TabBar SKGLView rendering is fixed and net48 full-framework targeting is added. Security mitigations and multiple native dependency updates are also included.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this release.*

## API Surface

- **SKManagedStream reworked: parent/child chain replaced with SKData snapshot** — The internal stream lifetime model is replaced with a cleaner SKData snapshot approach, fixing edge-case disposal issues and simplifying the ownership model. ([#3589](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3589))

## Bug Fixes

- **MAUI TabBar SKGLView rendering fixed** — SKGLView no longer stops rendering after a tab switch in a MAUI TabBar on Android. — ❤️ [@SimonvBez](https://github.com/SimonvBez) ([#3076](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3076))
- **GTK4 Cairo assertion crash fixed** — SKDrawingArea in GTK4 was triggering a Cairo assertion failure; the rendering path has been corrected. ([#3562](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3562))
- **AoT crash with IlcDisableReflection fixed** — Native AoT builds using IlcDisableReflection=true no longer crash at startup. ([#3485](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3485))
- **tvOS native builds split to device and simulator frameworks** — tvOS NativeReference targets now correctly separate device and simulator slices, matching the iOS pattern. ([#3563](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3563), [#3561](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3561))
- **DesignMode detection uses property directly in WinForms** — SkiaSharp.Views.WindowsForms now uses the DesignMode property directly rather than reflection-based detection. ([#3614](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3614))

## Platform

- **Linux Bionic native assets added** — Native library assets for Linux Bionic (the Android-like Linux variant) are now included, enabling SkiaSharp use in Bionic-based environments. — ❤️ [@4Darmygeometry](https://github.com/4Darmygeometry) ([#3217](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3217))
- **GTK4 view added via GirCore bindings** — A new SkiaSharp.Views.Gtk4 package provides SKDrawingArea for GTK4 applications using the GirCore.Gtk-4.0 bindings. ([#3527](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3527))
- **Tizen x64 and arm64 native builds added** — Tizen support expands to x64 and arm64 architectures with updated Studio 6.1 tooling and TFM fixes. ([#3620](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3620), [#3619](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3619))
- **.NET 10 SDK with workload version pinning** — The build system is updated to the .NET 10 SDK with explicit workload version pinning for reproducible builds. ([#3514](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3514))
- **net48 full-framework target added** — A net48 (Windows .NET Framework 4.8) full-framework build target is added for Windows validation scenarios. — ❤️ [@4Darmygeometry](https://github.com/4Darmygeometry) ([#3631](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3631))
- **C# 13 support on legacy TFMs via PolySharp** — PolySharp is used to polyfill C# 13 language features on legacy target frameworks, keeping the codebase on the latest language version everywhere. — ❤️ [@4Darmygeometry](https://github.com/4Darmygeometry) ([#3642](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3642))

## Security

- **Spectre mitigations enabled for all native binaries** — Spectre v1 mitigation flags are now applied to both libSkiaSharp.dll (Windows) and libSkiaSharp.so (Linux/Android). — ❤️ [@sshumakov](https://github.com/sshumakov) ([#3502](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3502), [#3496](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3496))
- **Native dependencies updated** — libpng updated to 1.6.58 (from 1.6.54), libwebp to 1.6.0, brotli to 1.2.0, and unused dependencies have been removed. ([#3723](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3723), [#3478](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3478), [#3469](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3469), [#3463](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3463))

## HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.1.5

Ships HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.1.5 with Linux Bionic support, tvOS build fixes, and the .NET 10 SDK update from this release.

## Preview 1 (April 22, 2026)

Preview 1 introduced Linux Bionic support, GTK4 views, Tizen x64/arm64 builds, .NET 10 SDK, the MAUI TabBar fix, tvOS build splits, GTK4 crash fix, SKManagedStream rework, and numerous dependency updates.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.119.3-preview.1.1...v3.119.4-preview.1.1)

## Preview 1 (February 7, 2026)

Preview 1 of 3.119.3 delivered Spectre mitigations for Linux, the AoT reflection fix, Linux ARM64 crash fix, and libpng/libwebp/brotli updates.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.119.2...v3.119.3-preview.1.1)
